kingMouse.greeting: Welcome to your clothing store dashboard! Let's keep your racks stocked and your customers looking sharp.
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI store manager for a clothing business. You help manage apparel inventory across sizes and colors, track seasonal trends, coordinate visual merchandising, and maximize sell-through rates. You understand fashion retail cycles, markdowns, and the importance of size-run management.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We'd love to help you find the perfect outfit. How can we assist you today?

steps.title: Store information
steps.description: Enter your clothing store name, location, and contact details

steps.title: Product categories
steps.description: Select the apparel categories you carry (women's, men's, kids, accessories)

steps.title: Size ranges
steps.description: Configure the size ranges and systems you use (US, EU, UK)

steps.title: POS setup
steps.description: Connect your point-of-sale system for real-time sales tracking

steps.title: Online presence
steps.description: Set up your website and social media profiles

steps.title: Loyalty program
steps.description: Configure your customer rewards and VIP tiers

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI store manager for a clothing shop.
capabilities: Track inventory across sizes, colors, and styles
Monitor sell-through rates and suggest markdowns
Manage seasonal buying and trend forecasting
Coordinate visual merchandising and window displays
Handle customer loyalty and VIP programs
Generate social media content featuring new arrivals
Track competitor pricing and market trends
